name: 21-match-backtrack-bomb
description: Wildcard-match backtracking blowup: a 20,000-char input against a many-star pattern that can never match. An unmetered matcher would burn unbounded CPU here (the ReDoS shape); GenMURK charges every match unit as fuel, so the step budget refuses the run long before the host feels it — found while building the GM-R12 matcher, which is why match units charge fuel.
